productDisplayName: Puma Women Yalu Glam Black Shoes
description: Brighten up your wardrobe with this feminine pair of Yalu Glam shoes from puma. Sleek, comfortable and strong with a delicate looking design, these shoes look great when teamed with shorts, mini skirts or denims and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather upper for lightweight durability Stitch detailing and formstripes for style Textile lining for superior comfort puma cat appliqued on the toe box and collar Embroidered logo on the tongue Satin lace ups for style with a slip on design for ease of wear Midsole EcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort, protection from impact and support Outsole TPU outsole with wave grooves for traction and grip Embedded pivot point on the toe mound and heel for 180 degree movement of the foot shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
